summary: Adjusted the opening to carry forward the Prue/manuscript thread from the previous chapter and sharpened the final beat so the lingering stone-response leads cleanly into chapter 7.
edits: Reworked the opening sentence to anchor the scene in Owen's copied Prue notes before the spoon incident breaks it.
Added a faint stone-answer note to the closing sentence to bridge into the next chapter's corridor-ringing aftermath.
